collectiondata.overview:
Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata


Step into a destination where tropical beaches, spiritual heritage, shopping streets, and buzzing nightlife come together effortlessly. If you are searching for the Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata, Travelxploria brings you carefully designed itineraries that balance comfort, value, and unforgettable experiences.

As a trusted international tour operator, Travelxploria offers Thailand tour packages from Kolkata that are ideal for honeymoon couples, families, groups, and first-time international travelers. From smooth visa assistance to well-planned sightseeing, everything is handled so you can simply enjoy the journey.


Why Choose a Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata

Easy Visa on Arrival and Affordable Flights

Thailand offers a visa on arrival for Indian passport holders, making travel simple and stress free. Direct and one stop flights from Kolkata keep travel time short and costs reasonable, which makes Thailand one of the most affordable international holidays from Eastern India.

Beaches, Culture, and Nightlife in One Trip

Thailand delivers variety in a compact itinerary. Relax on island beaches, explore historic temples, shop in floating and night markets, and experience nightlife that ranges from cultural shows to rooftop dining.

Perfect for Couples, Families, and Groups

Whether it is a honeymoon, a family holiday, or a friends trip, a Thailand tour package from Kolkata can be fully customized. Family travelers get safe hotels and kid friendly attractions, while couples enjoy romantic experiences and privacy.



Top Thailand Tour Packages From Kolkata

5 to 7 Days Thailand Tour Package

Covering Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket, this itinerary is perfect for first time visitors. It includes city tours, island excursions, shopping time, and beach relaxation.

Thailand Honeymoon Package From Kolkata

Designed for newlyweds, these packages include romantic beach dinners, private island tours, couple spa sessions, and sunset cruises. Phuket and Krabi are popular honeymoon inclusions.

Budget Friendly Thailand Tour Package

Ideal for travelers looking for value. These packages focus on comfortable hotels, shared sightseeing tours, and efficient planning without compromising on major attractions.

Customized Family and Group Packages

Enjoy private transfers, flexible sightseeing, and attractions such as water parks, cultural shows, and interactive experiences. These packages are popular among families traveling with children or elderly members.



Bangkok

Famous for the Grand Palace, Wat Arun, floating markets, and nightlife cruises. Bangkok blends tradition and modern lifestyle seamlessly.

Pattaya

Known for Coral Island tours, water sports, family attractions, and vibrant evening entertainment.

Phuket

Thailand’s most popular island destination with Patong Beach, island hopping tours, and adventure activities like snorkeling and speed boat rides.

Chiang Mai

A cultural hub with ancient temples, mountain views, ethical elephant sanctuaries, and Thai cooking classes.

Phi Phi Islands

Crystal clear waters, dramatic limestone cliffs, and some of the best snorkeling spots in Thailand.



What Is Included in the Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata

​

Airport transfers and local transportation

Comfortable hotel accommodation with breakfast

Guided sightseeing tours

Visa assistance and travel support

Optional travel insurance



Best Time to Visit Thailand From Kolkata

November to February

The most popular season with pleasant weather, ideal for sightseeing and beach activities.

March to May

Best for island lovers and water sports enthusiasts. Expect warmer temperatures and fewer crowds.

June to October

Monsoon season with attractive discounts on Thailand tour packages. Great for budget travelers who prefer quieter destinations.



Frequently Asked Questions

Do Indian travelers need a visa for Thailand
Yes. Indians are eligible for visa on arrival, and Travelxploria assists with the complete process.

How many days are ideal for a Thailand trip from Kolkata
A 5 to 7 day trip is ideal to cover Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket comfortably.

Is Thailand safe for families and solo travelers
Yes. Thailand is considered safe, and our itineraries focus on well rated hotels and reliable transport.

What is the best price for a Thailand tour package from Kolkata
Prices vary by season and hotel category. Booking early or during off season offers the best value.


How to Book the Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers easy online booking, transparent pricing, and dedicated customer support. To get the best deals, book in advance, travel during shoulder seasons, and watch for festival offers.

Prepare your documents in advance, including passport, photographs, hotel confirmations, and some Thai Baht for local expenses.

Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. packages.overview:
Explore Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket

Embark on an unforgettable adventure through Thailand’s most vibrant destinations with Travelxploria. Begin your journey in Bangkok, the bustling capital city known for its lively street life, ornate temples, and vibrant culture. Visit iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace, the majestic Wat Arun, and the Wat Phra Kaew Temple, home to the revered Emerald Buddha. Experience the charm of Chao Phraya River cruises and indulge in shopping at markets like Chatuchak and Asiatique.

Next, head to Pattaya, a coastal city renowned for its beautiful beaches and lively entertainment. Relax at Jomtien Beach, visit the stunning Sanctuary of Truth, and enjoy the breathtaking Pattaya Viewpoint. Don’t miss the famous Coral Island, where you can enjoy water sports like snorkeling and parasailing, or explore the undersea world on a glass-bottom boat ride.

Your journey continues to Phuket, Thailand’s tropical paradise. Explore Patong Beach for its lively nightlife or unwind at the serene Kata and Karon Beaches. Discover Phang Nga Bay’s limestone cliffs, and enjoy a memorable boat ride to the stunning James Bond Island. Experience the cultural richness of Old Phuket Town and enjoy a relaxing day at Phuket’s Big Buddha, with panoramic views of the island.

Whether you’re seeking adventure, relaxation, or cultural immersion, this Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket tour offers an unforgettable experience of Thailand’s diverse beauty.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, it's time to continue your journey. After checking out, a Travelxploria representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to Bangkok in a comfortable vehicle. Enjoy the scenic drive as you leave the coastal charm behind and head toward Thailand’s bustling capital. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and take some time to unwind.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

packages.package_name: Uncover the Charm of Thailand Islands
packages.overview:
Discover Thailand’s Best with Travelxploria: Phi Phi Islands, Koh Samui, and Bangkok Adventure

Experience the vibrant charm of Thailand with Travelxploria on a tour that takes you from the crystal-clear waters of Phi Phi Islands to the serene beauty of Koh Samui and the cultural wonders of Bangkok.

Start your journey with a thrilling Phi Phi Island Tour. Cruise through the turquoise waters and visit Maya Bay, famous for its stunning scenery. Explore the awe-inspiring Viking Cave, a hidden gem, and enjoy unforgettable moments amidst the islands’ natural beauty.

Next, head to Koh Samui, Thailand’s second-largest island. Unwind at a luxurious resort, indulge in the lively nightlife at Ark Bar, and take in the island’s charm. Embark on a sightseeing tour to the iconic Big Buddha, the sacred Wat Khunaram, and the breathtaking vistas of Ang Thong Marine Park, a paradise of pristine beaches and emerald lagoons.

Your journey concludes in Bangkok, Thailand’s capital, where you’ll dive into the rich heritage of the city. Visit the majestic Grand Palace, the serene Wat Pho, and the iconic Wat Arun, capturing the essence of Thailand’s cultural treasures.

This tour offers a perfect blend of adventure, relaxation, and heritage, ensuring a memorable experience of Thailand’s most captivating destinations.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
• Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise – Sail past Bangkok’s illuminated landmarks, savoring delicious Thai cuisine with live traditional performances.
  • Bangkok Sightseeing Tour – Explore Wat Traimit’s Golden Buddha, the Grand Palace, and Emerald Buddha, immersing in Thailand’s cultural heritage.
  • Safari World Bangkok – Witness exotic wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and a scenic river safari for an unforgettable adventure.
  • Krabi 7 Island Tour – Discover pristine beaches, hidden lagoons, and vibrant marine life on a breathtaking speedboat excursion.
  • Krabi Rainforest Tour – Relax in the Emerald Pool and explore Tiger Cave Temple’s serene surroundings.
  • Patong Beach & Phuket Leisure – Unwind on soft sands, try exciting watersports, or visit Phuket Trickeye Museum.
  • Phuket City Tour & Tiger Kingdom – Visit Wat Chalong, explore Old Phuket Town, and interact with majestic tigers.
  • Phi Phi Island Tour – Snorkel in crystal-clear waters, relax at Maya Bay, and explore vibrant marine life.

[{"city":"Bangkok","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928393653-1740592915438-AdobeStock_131653309-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928394067-1740592915646-AdobeStock_171690662-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1740928396663-1740592915011-AdobeStock_98443741-min.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Bangkok/1744961625353-AdobeStock_1612425-min.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Bangkok with Chao Phraya River Dinner Cruise","day_summary":"

Welcome to Bangkok, the vibrant heart of Thailand! As you arrive at Bangkok Airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly greet you. Sit back and relax as you’re comfortably transferred to your hotel. Once you check in, take some time to unwind and soak in the city’s energy.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. After a delightful stay, it’s time to check out and continue your journey with Travelxploria. Our representative will ensure a smooth transfer to the airport for your flight to the breathtaking paradise of Krabi. Upon arrival, you'll be warmly welcomed and escorted to your hotel, where you can relax and soak in the stunning tropical vibes.

Afterwards embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
• James Bond Island – Cruise through emerald waters, explore iconic caves, and relish a delicious seafood lunch onboard.
  • Pattaya Transfer – Fly to Pattaya, unwind at your hotel, and embrace the vibrant coastal vibes.
  • Coral Island – Bask in the sun, dive into thrilling water sports, and enjoy a scenic beachfront lunch.
  • Bangkok City Tour – Marvel at the Golden Buddha, visit Gems Gallery, and admire the Marble Temple’s architecture.
  • Dreamworld & Snow Town – Experience thrilling rides, magical lands, and a snowy winter wonderland in tropical Bangkok.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off.

After a hearty breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with your journey to Bangkok, ensuring a smooth and comfortable transfer. Upon arrival, you’ll be warmly welcomed and guided through a hassle-free hotel check-in. Take some time to settle in and unwind in the comfort of your accommodation.

Afterwards, our representative will lead you on a captivating half-day tour through the heart of Bangkok. Your journey begins at the magnificent Golden Buddha, where its radiant gold glow inspires a sense of peace and reverence, before moving on to the serene Mahaputra Temple, a haven of intricate artistry and spiritual calm. The adventure continues at the dazzling Gems Gallery, where you are mesmerized by a vibrant display of cultural treasures and sparkling history. As the morning unfolds with enriching encounters and awe-inspiring sights, you are comfortably returned to your hotel in the afternoon, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Bangkok’s unique heritage.

After a hearty breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative meets you at your hotel lobby, setting the stage for a day of wonder at Dream World Bangkok. Your adventure begins as you’re whisked away to a land where imagination meets thrill—a place where roller coaster loops and enchanting themed zones effortlessly transport you back to the magic of childhood. Lose yourself in a vibrant world of exhilarating rides and captivating shows, each corner designed to spark joy and fuel your sense of adventure. With seamless transfers and an atmosphere brimming with excitement, this tour promises an unforgettable escape into the heart of Bangkok’s most playful amusement park.

Experience a magical winter escape at Snow Town, where you can enjoy snowball fights, sledding, and ice skating in a charming snowy setting. Feel the thrill of winter activities in the heart of Bangkok. After a fun-filled adventure, our representative will ensure a comfortable transfer back to your hotel for a relaxing overnight stay.

packages.overview:
• Tiger Park Pattaya – Experience an extraordinary close encounter with majestic tigers and playful cubs, creating unforgettable memories.
  • Alcazar Show – Enjoy a dazzling cabaret performance with stunning costumes, vibrant music, and breathtaking stage effects.
  • Coral Island – Escape to pristine beaches, soak in turquoise waters, or indulge in thrilling water sports.
  • Underwater World – Walk through a mesmerizing ocean tunnel, surrounded by exotic marine creatures.
  • Nong Nooch Village – Immerse yourself in Thai culture with spectacular elephant shows, lush gardens, and traditional performances.
  • Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise – Savor a delightful dinner while cruising past Bangkok’s illuminated skyline.
  • Bangkok City & Temple Tour – Explore Bangkok’s iconic temples and cultural heritage, from Wat Arun to the Grand Palace.
  • Safari World & Marine Park – Witness exotic wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and the mesmerizing dolphin performance.

[{"city":"Pattaya","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961601818-AdobeStock_174974335.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604012-AdobeStock_366309928.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604111-AdobeStock_1091251878.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive Pattaya from Bangkok with Visit Tiger Park & Alcazar Show Tiger Park in the Evening","day_summary":"

As you arrive at Bangkok airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly welcome you. After a smooth immigration process, you’ll be comfortably escorted to your private car for a scenic transfer to Pattaya. Sit back, relax, and enjoy the journey as you take in glimpses of Thailand’s bustling streets and serene coastal views. You will be transferred to Pattaya hotel.

Get up close with majestic tigers at Tiger Park Pattaya on this thrilling experience, brought to you by Travelxploria,Enjoy a hassle-free hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring a safe and memorable visit. Walk among these incredible big cats and capture once-in-a-lifetime photos as you interact with tigers of various sizes in a well-maintained, ethical environment. Learn about their care, behavior, and conservation efforts while experiencing a unique wildlife encounter. After an exhilarating day, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off, making this adventure smooth and enjoyable. With the best on-ground support staff, this tour guarantees the ultimate wildlife experience in Pattaya.

Experience the magic of Pattaya’s world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show with seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by your Travelxploria representative.We ensure an unforgettable evening with the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide. Witness a dazzling spectacle of glamorous performances, extravagant costumes, and mesmerizing choreography in a state-of-the-art theater. This high-energy cabaret show blends Thai culture with global influences, creating a visual masterpiece that will leave you in awe. Sit back, relax, and enjoy a night of entertainment, music, and vibrant performances. After the show, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off at your hotel making your Pattaya experience will be truly unforgettable.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Dive into an enchanting underwater experience with Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, as we take you on a journey through Underwater World Pattaya. Enjoy the convenience of hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and expert tour guide, ensuring you have the best experience. Walk through the stunning 100-meter-long acrylic tunnel, where vibrant marine life surrounds you on all sides. Discover a variety of sea creatures, from graceful stingrays to majestic sharks, and even enjoy interactive feeding sessions. Whether you’re a marine enthusiast or simply looking for a fun and educational experience, this aquarium promises excitement for all ages. After a memorable adventure, relax as we provide a comfortable hotel drop-off making memories truly unforgettable.

Begin your journey with a convenient hotel pick-up by your Travelxploria representative, ensuring a seamless and comfortable experience. With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, explore the breathtaking Nong Nooch Tropical Botanical Garden, one of Thailand’s most beautiful landscapes. Wander through vibrant themed gardens, from the French Garden to the Orchid Garden, and marvel at the diverse plant species. Witness cultural performances, including traditional Thai dances and an exhilarating elephant show. Take in the serenity of this lush paradise, perfect for nature lovers and photography enthusiasts. After an enchanting experience, enjoy a hassle-free hotel drop-off.

After a delightful breakfast, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out, ensuring a hassle-free departure from your hotel. Settle into a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you embark on a scenic drive to Bangkok. Along the way, soak in the changing landscapes, from Pattaya’s coastal charm to Bangkok’s vibrant cityscape and check in at the hotel in Bangkok.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

packages.overview:
• Tiger Park Pattaya – Experience the thrill of close encounters with majestic tigers, capturing unforgettable moments with these incredible creatures.
  • Alcazar Cabaret Show – Be mesmerized by a dazzling display of music, dance, and culture in a vibrant, high-energy performance.
  • Coral Island Tour – Escape to pristine beaches, soak in the sun, or dive into thrilling water adventures in turquoise waters.
  • Underwater World Pattaya – Walk through a mesmerizing underwater tunnel, surrounded by exotic marine life and colorful coral reefs.
  • Bangkok City & Temple Tour – Explore the cultural heart of Bangkok, visiting iconic temples and historic landmarks.
  • Chao Phraya Princess Dinner Cruise – Sail along the illuminated skyline of Bangkok, enjoying a luxurious dinner with live entertainment.
  • Safari World & Marine Park – Witness fascinating wildlife, thrilling animal shows, and up-close encounters with exotic species.

[{"city":"Pattaya","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961601818-AdobeStock_174974335.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604012-AdobeStock_366309928.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604111-AdobeStock_1091251878.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive Pattaya with Visit to Tiger Park & Alcazar Show in Evening","day_summary":"

As you arrive at Bangkok Airport, a warm welcome awaits you from our Travelxploria representative, who will ensure a seamless transfer to your hotel in Pattaya. Sit back and relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you journey through scenic landscapes toward the vibrant coastal city.

Get up close with majestic tigers at Tiger Park Pattaya on this thrilling experience, brought to you by Travelxploria,Enjoy a hassle-free hotel pick-up, accompanied by our representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring a safe and memorable visit. Walk among these incredible big cats and capture once-in-a-lifetime photos as you interact with tigers of various sizes in a well-maintained, ethical environment. Learn about their care, behavior, and conservation efforts while experiencing a unique wildlife encounter. After an exhilarating day, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off, making this adventure smooth and enjoyable. With the best on-ground support staff, this tour guarantees the ultimate wildlife experience in Pattaya.

Experience the magic of Pattaya’s world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show with seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by your Travelxploria representative.We ensure an unforgettable evening with the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide. Witness a dazzling spectacle of glamorous performances, extravagant costumes, and mesmerizing choreography in a state-of-the-art theater. This high-energy cabaret show blends Thai culture with global influences, creating a visual masterpiece that will leave you in awe. Sit back, relax, and enjoy a night of entertainment, music, and vibrant performances. After the show, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off at your hotel making your Pattaya experience will be truly unforgettable.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a smooth transfer to Bangkok. Relax in a comfortable, air-conditioned vehicle as you travel through scenic routes toward Thailand’s vibrant capital. Along the way, take in glimpses of local life, bustling markets, and lush landscapes. Upon arrival, you will check-in at your hotel

Our Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

packages.package_name: Tropical Wonders and City Lights of Thailand
packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you on a vibrant journey through Thailand’s cultural and coastal treasures. Step into the whimsical world of Art in Paradise, Thailand’s only 3D illusion museum, for a playful start. Escape to Coral Island’s pristine shores, where crystal-clear waters and beachside adventures await. In Bangkok, sail along the Chao Phraya River on a magical dinner cruise, enjoying dazzling city views under the stars. Discover Bangkok’s rich heritage with a guided tour of its grand temples and palaces, creating memories that blend art, relaxation, and tradition.

[{"city":"Pattaya","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961601818-AdobeStock_174974335.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604012-AdobeStock_366309928.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Pattaya/1744961604111-AdobeStock_1091251878.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrive Pattaya- Later in evening visit Art in Paradise-Art Museum","day_summary":"

Welcome to the vibrant capital of Thailand – Bangkok! As you arrive, our Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you , ensuring a seamless arrival experience. After collecting your luggage, sit back and relax as we embark on a scenic drive to Pattaya, Thailand’s famous resort city. Enjoy the changing landscapes, from Bangkok’s bustling streets to Pattaya’s lively coastline. Upon arrival, check in to your hotel and unwind after your journey.

Step into a world of illusion at Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand’s largest interactive 3D art museum, with Travelxploria, the leading travel agency in Thailand. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with hotel pick-up, guided by our friendly representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring you make the most of this immersive attraction. Walk through stunning hand-painted 3D artworks that let you become part of the scene—pose with wild animals, step into famous landmarks, or float in surreal landscapes. This interactive gallery is perfect for photography lovers and families looking for a fun and unique adventure. After exploring this magical space, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, this experience promises endless creativity, fun, and unforgettable memories.

As evening falls over Bangkok, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an unforgettable Chao Phraya Dinner Cruise. Glide along the shimmering river as the city lights reflect off the water, illuminating iconic landmarks like the Grand Palace and Wat Arun in their nocturnal splendor. Savor a sumptuous dinner featuring a delectable fusion of Thai and international cuisines, while the vibrant atmosphere comes alive with live music, a dazzling cabaret show, and an authentic traditional Thai dance performance. With insightful commentary about the city's rich heritage and a magical nights-cape as your backdrop, this enchanting cruise offers a perfect blend of romance and relaxation before you are comfortably returned to your hotel.

After a delightful breakfast, a friendly Travelxploria representative will pick you up for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

packages.overview:
• Coral Island & Alcazar Show – A thrilling speedboat ride takes you to Coral Island, where crystal-clear waters and adventure await. Later, witness the glamorous Alcazar Cabaret Show, a dazzling performance of music and dance.
  • Nong Nooch Garden – Immerse yourself in the cultural charm of Thailand with breathtaking landscapes, Thai folk performances, and the famous elephant show.
  • Bangkok Transfer, SEA Life & Madame Tussauds – Travel to Bangkok, where you’ll explore SEA Life Ocean World, home to exotic marine life, and meet life-like wax figures at Madame Tussauds.
  • Safari World & Marine Park – Experience wildlife up close at Safari World, from playful dolphins to majestic tigers, in an exciting day of exploration.
  • Chao Phraya Princess Dinner Cruise – Enjoy a magical evening aboard a luxurious cruise, indulging in delicious cuisine while admiring Bangkok’s glittering skyline.

As you arrive in this lively coastal city, check in and take some time to unwind after your journey. The first day of your Thailand tour is all about relaxation settle into your hotel, soak in the serene vibes, or take a stroll around the vibrant streets. Pattaya’s charm awaits, but for now, enjoy a restful evening. Overnight stay in Pattaya.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Experience the magic of Pattaya’s world-famous Alcazar Cabaret Show with seamless hotel pick-up and drop-off by your Travelxploria representative.We ensure an unforgettable evening with the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide. Witness a dazzling spectacle of glamorous performances, extravagant costumes, and mesmerizing choreography in a state-of-the-art theater. This high-energy cabaret show blends Thai culture with global influences, creating a visual masterpiece that will leave you in awe. Sit back, relax, and enjoy a night of entertainment, music, and vibrant performances. After the show, we’ll ensure a smooth drop-off at your hotel making your Pattaya experience will be truly unforgettable.

With the best on-ground support staff and an expert Travelxploria guide, explore the breathtaking Nong Nooch Tropical Botanical Garden, one of Thailand’s most beautiful landscapes. Witness cultural performances, including traditional Thai dances and an exhilarating elephant show. Take in the serenity of this lush paradise, perfect for nature lovers and photography enthusiasts. After an enchanting experience, enjoy a hassle-free hotel drop-off.

After a delightful stay in Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will assist you with a smooth transfer to Bangkok in a comfortable private vehicle. Sit back and enjoy the scenic drive as you leave behind Pattaya’s coastal beauty and head toward Thailand’s bustling capital. Upon arrival in Bangkok, check in to your hotel and take some time to relax.

A friendly Travelxploria representative meets you at your hotel lobby and ushers you into an adventure that transports you to the mesmerizing realm of Sea Life Bangkok Ocean World. As you arrive, you're welcomed into an underwater kingdom bursting with vibrant marine life and enchanting exhibits. Wander through a stunning ocean tunnel where every glance reveals a captivating dance of colorful fish and graceful rays. Interactive displays and touch pools invite you to get close and personal with the wonders of the deep, sparking your curiosity and imagination. This immersive journey is more than just a visit—it's a magical voyage into the heart of the ocean's secrets.

Step into the world of fame and glamour with Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, as you embark on a guided tour of Madame Tussauds Bangkok. Begin your experience with a convenient hotel pick-up by our experienced representative and expert tour guide, ensuring a smooth and enjoyable visit. Walk through lifelike wax figures of international celebrities, world leaders, sports legends, and historical icons. Pose for photos with your favorite stars and enjoy interactive exhibits that bring history and pop culture to life. After an unforgettable visit, relax as we provide a hassle-free hotel drop-off.

After a hearty breakfast at your hotel, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative, setting the stage for a day of excitement and exploration. Your adventure begins at the Safari Park, where you'll wander through lush, expansive landscapes and encounter majestic animals roaming in naturalistic habitats. Each step brings you closer to Thailand's vibrant wildlife, as you marvel at the beauty and diversity of nature.

Next, the journey continues at the Marine Park, where a world of color and life unfolds before your eyes. Here, engaging exhibits and vivid aquatic displays reveal the enchanting mysteries of the underwater realm. As the day unfolds, you'll indulge in a sumptuous buffet lunch, featuring a delightful fusion of local and international flavors that perfectly complements your adventure.

With your appetite and senses thoroughly satisfied, you'll be gently returned to your hotel, leaving you with unforgettable memories of a day filled with the splendor of both land and sea, all expertly curated by Travelxploria.

packages.overview: Embark on an unforgettable Thailand adventure with Travelxploria, beginning with a thrilling speedboat ride to the stunning Coral Island, where you can dive into crystal-clear waters and exciting water sports. Immerse yourself in Thai culture at the lush Nong Nooch Village before traveling to vibrant Bangkok. Explore its treasures, from the dazzling Gems Gallery to the revered Golden Buddha and Reclining Buddha Temples, and enjoy shopping in the bustling markets. Experience the magic of Safari World & Marine Park’s wildlife shows and cap off your journey with a serene Chao Phraya River dinner cruise, taking in Bangkok’s glittering skyline.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Afterwards head to Nong Nooch Village, where you’ll witness mesmerizing Thai Cultural and Elephant Shows, showcasing Thailand’s vibrant traditions. Wander through beautifully landscaped gardens and admire traditional performances that bring the country’s heritage to life. Later, unwind with a soothing 1-hour traditional Thai massage, allowing yourself to fully relax and rejuvenate.

packages.overview:
• Dazzling Alcazar Show – Witness a spectacular, glamorous cabaret performance filled with dazzling costumes and mesmerizing acts.
  • Thrilling Coral Island Tour – Enjoy a speedboat ride, indulge in water sports, and relax on pristine white sandy beaches.
  • Explore Art in Paradise – Step into a world of interactive 3D art and capture surreal optical illusion photographs.
  • Visit the Big Buddha Temple – Experience serenity and breathtaking views from this revered cultural landmark.
  • Scenic Drive to Bangkok – Travel back to the bustling city, stopping at Gems Gallery to admire Thailand’s exquisite craftsmanship.
  • Bangkok Temple Tour – Discover iconic temples, including Wat Traimit, Wat Pho, and the magnificent Marble Temple.
  • Shopping Extravaganza – Explore Bangkok’s vibrant markets and high-end malls for souvenirs, fashion, and local crafts.
  • Optional Safari World & Marine Park – Encounter exotic wildlife, watch thrilling shows, and enjoy a delicious lunch.

Travelxploria, Thailand’s leading travel agency, invites you on an unforgettable adventure to Coral Island (Koh Larn). Begin your journey with a hassle-free hotel pick-up, where your Travelxploria representative and expert guide will ensure a seamless experience. With the best on-ground support staff, hop on a high-speed boat and cruise across the crystal-clear waters of the Gulf of Thailand. Explore Coral Island’s pristine beaches, turquoise waters, and vibrant marine life, with options to indulge in thrilling activities like parasailing, snorkeling, jet skiing, and banana boat rides. Relax on the beach and enjoy a delicious Thai lunch with stunning ocean views. After a perfect day in paradise, return to Pattaya with a comfortable hotel drop-off. 

Step into a world of illusion at Art in Paradise Pattaya, Thailand’s largest interactive 3D art museum, with Travelxploria, the leading travel agency in Thailand. Enjoy a hassle-free experience with hotel pick-up, guided by our friendly representative and an expert tour guide, ensuring you make the most of this immersive attraction. Walk through stunning hand-painted 3D artworks that let you become part of the scene—pose with wild animals, step into famous landmarks, or float in surreal landscapes. This interactive gallery is perfect for photography lovers and families looking for a fun and unique adventure. After exploring this magical space, relax as we provide a hotel drop-off. With Travelxploria’s best on-ground support staff, this experience promises endless creativity, fun, and unforgettable memories.

Later visit the iconic Big Buddha Temple, a spiritual landmark offering breathtaking views and a sense of serenity. After a day of exploration, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay in Pattaya.

packages.overview: Travelxploria invites you to begin your Thailand adventure with a scenic transfer to the lively coastal city of Pattaya. In the evening, be enchanted by the spectacular Alcazar Show, featuring vibrant costumes, energetic dances, and dazzling stage performances. Cruise across sparkling waters to Coral Island by speedboat, where turquoise seas and golden sands offer the perfect setting for thrilling water activities and a delicious seaside lunch. Next, head to bustling Bangkok for an enriching city tour, exploring its magnificent temples, rich culture, and architectural marvels. Your journey concludes with a thrilling day at Safari World & Marine Park, where exotic wildlife encounters, safari rides, and lively marine shows create unforgettable memories.

As you arrive in Bangkok from Pattaya, our Travelxploria representative will be there to greet you with a warm welcome. You’ll be comfortably transferred to your hotel, where you can check in and unwind after your journey.

Get ready for an immersive Bangkok City and Temple Tour that unveils the city's majestic heritage. Begin your journey at the illustrious Grand Palace and the sacred Wat Phra Kaew, where intricate details and timeless artistry narrate Thailand's rich history and spiritual legacy. Continue to the revered Wat Pho, home to the magnificent reclining Buddha, and then cross over to admire the shimmering beauty of Wat Arun with its unique, porcelain-adorned spires. Whether you opt for a guided tour complete with admission tickets for a seamless experience or decide to explore these iconic landmarks on your own, this adventure promises an unforgettable blend of cultural splendor and modern vibrancy in the heart of Bangkok.

packages.package_name: Romantic Tour of Phuket and Krabi
packages.overview: Embark on a sun-soaked, four-night escape with Travelxploria: start with two nights in vibrant Phuket, where you’ll wander colorful local markets, dive into the pulsating nightlife of Bangla Road, and unwind on golden shores before setting sail on a full-day Phi Phi Island adventure—snorkeling in crystal-clear bays, stepping ashore at iconic Maya Bay, and soaking up seaside panoramas. Then it’s off to Krabi for two nights of island hopping: explore the stunning Four Islands—Phra Nang Cave Beach’s limestone cliffs, Chicken Island’s photogenic rock formations, Poda Island’s powder-white sands, and the secluded Tup Island sandbar—interspersed with scenic boat rides and optional water sports. Throughout your journey, balance thrilling excursions with blissful beach days and sunset cocktails, all seamlessly arranged so you can simply relax, explore, and make unforgettable memories.

Resort & Villas Krabi.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day 4 Islands tour by by Long tail boat with Lunch","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
Unveil the Wonders of Krabi with Travelxploria

Embark on an unforgettable adventure with Travelxploria as you explore the best of Krabi, Thailand’s tropical paradise. Start your journey with a visit to Phi Phi Island, where you’ll experience crystal-clear waters and explore iconic spots like Maya Bay, Loh Samah Bay, and the charming Monkey Beach—a day of sun, sand, and unforgettable memories.

Next, get up close and personal with majestic wildlife at the Tiger Kingdom. Interact with tigers of all ages, from playful cubs to powerful adults, while learning about their natural instincts and conservation efforts.

Continue your island-hopping adventure with the Krabi 4 Islands Tour, where you'll visit stunning beaches and crystal-clear waters at Phranang Cave Beach, the unique Tup Islets, Chicken Island, and Koh Poda. Each stop offers breathtaking scenery and opportunities for swimming, snorkeling, and relaxation.

Conclude your trip with an exploration of Krabi’s Rainforest. Visit the peaceful Tiger Cave Temple, surrounded by lush greenery, and take a refreshing dip in the stunning Emerald Pool for a tranquil and rejuvenating experience.

This tour is the perfect blend of wildlife, nature, and beach relaxation, offering you an incredible taste of Krabi’s natural beauty.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

packages.overview: Embark on a captivating Thailand escape with Travelxploria, where ancient pageantry and island paradise blend seamlessly into one unforgettable journey. Your adventure begins under a canopy of light and sound at the Siam Niramit Show, then at dawn you’ll set sail for Phi Phi Island’s ivory sands and turquoise waters, snorkeling vibrant coral reefs and hopping between hidden coves framed by towering limestone cliffs. From seaside thrills you’ll travel to Phuket’s storied heart—standing in awe before the marble serenity of the Big Buddha, exploring the gilded halls of Wat Chalong, and wandering the pastel streets of Old Phuket Town in search of fiery satay, sweet roti, and cooling iced tea. With insider access, seamless transfers, and the warmth of small-group camaraderie, Travelxploria ensures every moment—from epic legends to island dreams—becomes a lasting memory.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: Best of Phuket Krabi Holiday Package
packages.overview:
• Transfer to Krabi – Begin your journey with a scenic transfer to Krabi, where relaxation and tropical beauty await.
  • Krabi Four Island Tour – Explore stunning islands, crystal-clear waters, and picturesque caves on this breathtaking island-hopping adventure.
  • Tiger Cave & Emerald Pool Tour – Discover Krabi’s lush rainforests, sacred temples, soothing hot springs, and the enchanting Emerald Pool.
  • Transfer to Phuket & Fantasea Show – Enjoy a cultural extravaganza at Phuket Fantasea, featuring dazzling performances and a grand buffet dinner.
  • Phi Phi Island Tour – Sail to paradise, swim in turquoise waters, and snorkel among vibrant marine life on this unforgettable island tour.
  • Phuket City Tour – Uncover Phuket’s charm with panoramic viewpoints, majestic temples, and rich cultural heritage on an immersive sightseeing journey.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

After a delightful breakfast, it’s time to bid farewell to the serene beauty of Krabi. Our Travelxploria representative will assist you with check-out and ensure a smooth transfer to Phuket, Thailand’s largest and most vibrant island. Enjoy the scenic journey as you pass emerald waters and stunning coastal views. Upon arrival, check in at your carefully selected hotel and take a moment to relax. Enjoy a restful stay.

In the evening, you'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to embark on an unforgettable Phuket FantaSea tour. As one of the best tour operators in the region, we ensure a smooth and memorable journey as you are transported to this dazzling cultural theme park. Upon arrival, you’ll be immersed in a spectacular show that brings Thailand's rich heritage to life through captivating performances, intricate costumes, acrobatics, and breathtaking pyrotechnics. After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.
