You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

packages.overview:
Travelxploria’s Thai odyssey begins in the ethereal seascapes of Krabi, where you board a traditional longtail boat at dawn and drift through hidden coves and emerald lagoons. Feel the gentle sea breeze as you plunge into the warm, turquoise waters, exploring vibrant coral gardens and schools of tropical fish. As day turns to dusk, witness nature’s light show: a fiery sunset painting the sky in hues of saffron and rose, followed by a surreal snorkeling experience beneath a veil of glowing bioluminescent plankton—each stroke revealing tiny sparks of neon that dance around you in the dark sea.

Next, you’ll be whisked away to the storied shores of Phuket, Thailand’s largest island playground. After unwinding on pristine, palm-fringed beaches, prepare for an evening of enchantment at Phuket Fantasea. This cultural extravaganza unfolds under a canopy of stars, featuring acrobatic elephants, traditional dance, and elaborate stage scenes drawn from ancient Thai legends, all accompanied by a sumptuous buffet showcasing the best of Thai and international cuisine.

The grand finale propels you across the Andaman Sea by speedboat to James Bond Island—immortalized in “The Man with the Golden Gun”—where towering limestone karsts rise dramatically from jade-green waters. Glide through the labyrinthine bays of Phang Nga, marveling at sea caves and rock formations sculpted by time, before settling at a secluded beachfront for a freshly prepared lunch of local delicacies. As you savor every bite with the sound of gentle waves lapping at the shore, you’ll understand why this cinematic landscape remains one of Thailand’s most irresistible treasures.

End the day with a peaceful night's rest.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

packages.overview:
Phuket – The Pearl of the Andaman

  • Thailand’s largest island, known for its beautiful beaches and vibrant nightlife.

  • Patong Beach: Famous for its lively nightlife, beach clubs, and shopping.

  • Phi Phi Islands: A breathtaking island getaway with crystal-clear waters.

  • Big Buddha & Wat Chalong: Must-visit cultural landmarks in Phuket.

  • James Bond Island: A scenic limestone rock formation, ideal for boat tours.

  • Phang Nga Bay: Stunning emerald waters, caves, and limestone karsts for kayaking.

Krabi – A Tropical Paradise

  • Known for its stunning limestone cliffs, turquoise waters, and serene beaches.

  • Railay Beach: A secluded paradise accessible only by boat.

  • Ao Nang Beach: A lively beachfront with restaurants, markets, and nightlife.

  • Four Islands Tour: Visit Phra Nang Cave Beach, Chicken Island, Poda Island & Tup Island.

  • Emerald Pool & Hot Springs: Natural hot water pools for relaxation.

  • Tiger Cave Temple: A cultural and scenic viewpoint after a rewarding climb.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

packages.package_name: Thai Island Trilogy: Phuket, Krabi & Koh Samui Escape
packages.overview:
​Travelxploria’s Andaman & Gulf Island Escape sweeps you from Phuket’s vibrant shores to Krabi’s hidden coves and the laid-back charms of Koh Samui—all in one seamless journey. Begin in Phuket, where powder-white sands meet turquoise seas: rise early for a snorkeling excursion to Coral Island’s rainbow reefs, unwind on Patong Beach with a beachside massage, then toast the sunset from a hilltop viewpoint before savoring fresh seafood at a cliff-side restaurant.

Next, drift south to Krabi’s dramatic limestone cliffs: board a traditional longtail boat at dawn to explore the tranquil lagoons of Hong Island, climb the “Tiger Cave” for panoramic views over emerald jungles, and plunge into the cool waters of Railay Beach’s hidden grottoes. As dusk falls, gather around a beach bonfire to admire bioluminescent plankton dancing at your toes.

Finally, hop across the gulf to Koh Samui, where coconut palms sway above secret bays. Spend your mornings kayaking through Ang Thong Marine Park’s karst-strewn islands, indulge in a beachside yoga session as the sun rises, and explore the island’s spiritual side at the Big Buddha Temple. Treat your taste buds to Samui’s famous fresh-pressed coconut curries and mango sticky rice, then dance the night away at a chic beachfront lounge under stars.

From snorkeling and sea-cave adventures to cultural encounters and island-hopping bliss, Travelxploria’s bespoke tour weaves together Thailand’s most iconic beach escapes into an unforgettable island odyssey.

As you arrive in the tropical paradise of Phuket, our Travelxploria representative will be there to warmly welcome you. After a smooth transfer to your hotel, take some time to relax and soak in the island vibes.

In the evening, you'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to embark on an unforgettable Phuket FantaSea tour. As one of the best tour operators in the region, we ensure a smooth and memorable journey as you are transported to this dazzling cultural theme park. Upon arrival, you’ll be immersed in a spectacular show that brings Thailand's rich heritage to life through captivating performances, intricate costumes, acrobatics, and breathtaking pyrotechnics. The magical atmosphere of Phuket FantaSea, with its unique blend of tradition and fantasy, promises an evening full of wonder and excitement. After experiencing the enchantment of the night, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, leaving you with lasting memories of Thailand’s vibrant cultural spirit.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Leave the vibrant shores of Phuket behind as our Travelxploria representative ensures a smooth and comfortable transfer to the breathtaking paradise of Krabi. As you journey through scenic coastal roads, soak in the picturesque landscapes of limestone cliffs and emerald waters. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and take a moment to relax.

Immerse yourself in the vibrant essence of Krabi as a friendly Travelxploria representative collects you from your hotel to begin an engaging city tour. Journey through bustling streets adorned with ancient temples, colorful local markets, and scenic riverfronts that showcase the authentic spirit of Krabi. Discover cultural treasures like Wat Kaew Korawaram and witness everyday life unfolding amid charming neighborhoods where traditional crafts and modern touches blend seamlessly. Capture unforgettable moments as you stroll past lively street scenes, sampling local flavors and soaking in the rich heritage of this dynamic city. This immersive tour offers a captivating glimpse into Krabi’s timeless charm and leaves you with cherished memories of its unique cultural tapestry.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Start your day with a delightful breakfast at the hotel, soaking in the serene vibes of Krabi one last time. Afterward, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer to Krabi Airport for your flight to the tropical paradise of Samui. Upon arrival, our friendly representative will be there to greet you and escort you to your hotel. Check in, settle into your cozy accommodation, and take a moment to unwind. The rest of the day is yours explore the island’s laid-back charm at your own pace.

Embark on a full-day adventure with Travelxploria to the breathtaking Angthong Marine National Park, a stunning 250-square-kilometer paradise northwest of Koh Samui. Our representative will ensure a seamless experience as you set sail on a shared big boat toward Angthong Island, where nature’s beauty awaits. Explore Mae Koh, home to a picturesque beach and the mesmerizing emerald saltwater lake, Thale Nai. Savor a delightful lunch at Koh Paluay, an island untouched by modern development. Later, indulge in activities like swimming, sunbathing, canoeing, or simply unwinding on pristine white sands, making the most of this unforgettable tropical escape.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Jungle Safari at Koh Samui","day_summary":"

Get ready for an exhilarating jungle safari jeep tour with Travelxploria, taking you through the heart of Koh Samui’s untouched wilderness. Our representative will ensure a seamless adventure as you hop onto a 4x4 off-road ride, navigating through lush jungles and uncovering the island’s hidden gems. Feel the thrill of exploring the rugged outback, where nature thrives in its purest form. Take a refreshing break beneath a cascading waterfall, letting the cool waters rejuvenate you. This adventure blends adrenaline, scenic beauty, and relaxation, offering an unforgettable way to experience Koh Samui’s untamed side.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Departure Day ","day_summary":"

As the journey comes to an end, start your morning with a delightful breakfast, savoring the last moments of your incredible trip. Our Travelxploria representative will be there to ensure a smooth and comfortable transfer to the airport, assisting you every step of the way. As you head for your flight back home, take with you cherished memories of your journey.

packages.package_name: Hidden Lagoons & Sunset Shores: Krabi & Phuket
packages.overview: Travelxploria’s 5-night Southern Thailand escape begins with two nights in Krabi’s emerald paradise, where you’ll stay at a boutique beachfront resort, cruise by private longtail boat through mangrove channels to hidden lagoons, snorkel vibrant reefs, climb to the Tiger Cave Temple viewpoint for panoramic Andaman Sea vistas, kayak through sea-cave archways into a secret lagoon, and end your days beside a bioluminescent beach bonfire. Then, transfer to Phuket for three nights in a luxury villa overlooking turquoise waters, where you’ll speedboat to Coral Island for snorkeling and sunset views, wander Old Phuket Town’s Sino-Portuguese streets and savor local street-food, unwind on Kata Noi’s soft sands, and choose between island hopping to Phi Phi or Phang Nga Bay—paddling through limestone caves, picnicking on secluded islets, and capping each evening with signature Thai dinners under the stars.

[{"city":"Krabi","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Krabi/1740928310533-1740506023809-sea-5310426_1920.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Krabi/1740928310653-1740506023883-thailand-3573400_1920.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Krabi/1740928310178-1740506023586-m-o-e-JoxepWVTrNE-unsplash.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Krabi/1740928310313-1740506023680-poda-isand-2461181_1920.jpg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Phuket to Transfer to Krabi & Leisure","day_summary":"

Upon arrival at the airport, our friendly Travelxploria representative will warmly welcome you and ensure a smooth transfer to your hotel in Krabi. After check-in, take a moment to relax and soak in the serene vibes of this coastal paradise. The rest of the day is yours to explore—stroll through the charming streets, experience local culture, or unwind by the beach. If you seek adventure, visit Wat Tham Sua Temple or the Krabi Elephant Sanctuary. As the day winds down, return to your hotel for a restful overnight stay.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

In the evening, you'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to embark on an unforgettable Phuket FantaSea tour. As one of the best tour operators in the region, we ensure a smooth and memorable journey as you are transported to this dazzling cultural theme park. Upon arrival, you’ll be immersed in a spectacular show that brings Thailand's rich heritage to life through captivating performances, intricate costumes, acrobatics, and breathtaking pyrotechnics. The magical atmosphere of Phuket FantaSea, with its unique blend of tradition and fantasy, promises an evening full of wonder and excitement. After experiencing the enchantment of the night, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, leaving you with lasting memories of Thailand’s vibrant cultural spirit.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview:
Feel the warm Andaman breeze as you step off the ferry onto Krabi’s sun-kissed shores—your two-night escape begins with Travelxploria in full swing. Day One, we whisk you by private longtail boat to the legendary “Four Islands”: marvel at the emerald pools of Poda Island, stroll along the ivory sands of Chicken Island, snorkel amidst rainbow-fish in Tub Island’s coral gardens, and stand in awe at the karst cliffs framing Tup Island’s heart-shaped lagoon. As the sun dips low, return to your cliff-side boutique bungalow overlooking Railay Beach, where a sunset cocktail awaits and fire-dancers trace flames against a velvet sky.

Dawn of Day Two finds you gliding across limestone-splashed waters to the world-famous Phi Phi archipelago. On Phi Phi Don, we’ve arranged a private beach lunch beneath swaying palms, followed by a guided trek up to the iconic viewpoint—your lens will capture a panorama of turquoise bays and jagged isles. Dive into Maya Bay’s storied shallows or join our onboard marine biologist for a hands-on snorkeling session at Bamboo Island, discovering vibrant anemones and playful parrotfish. That evening, sail back to Krabi for a starlit seafood feast on Ao Nang’s waterfront, before drifting to sleep to the sound of lapping tides.

On Day Three, Travelxploria transfers you to Phuket in effortless comfort. Your three-night stay at a secluded hillside resort comes with cliff-pool vistas and spa treatments infused with local botanicals. Day Four is yours to roam Patong’s lively streets or unwind on Kata’s crescent beach, but at dusk we’ll escort you to the dazzling Phuket FantaSea cultural extravaganza. Watch elephants march in choreographed splendor, gasp at acrobats soaring above the Grand Palace stage, and savor a lavish Thai banquet fit for royalty. Your final full day can be spent kayaking through Phang Nga Bay’s James Bond-worthy limestone caves or simply lounging poolside with a coconut in hand.

Whether you seek pulsating adventure or serene relaxation, Travelxploria’s seamless orchestration—from Krabi’s hidden lagoons and Phi Phi’s cinematic beauty to Phuket’s electric nights—ensures every moment of your 2-night Krabi, 3-night Phuket odyssey becomes a treasured chapter in your travel story.

packages.overview:
Feel the spray of the Andaman Sea as Travelxploria whisks you by private longtail boat from Krabi’s sun-drenched shores to the renowned Four Islands, where you’ll marvel at Poda’s powder-white sands, wander the ivory arcs of Chicken Island, snorkel amid Tub’s kaleidoscopic coral gardens, and discover the heart-shaped lagoon of Tup Island. On return, a cliff-side boutique bungalow overlooking Railay Beach beckons, complete with a sunset cocktail as fire-dancers trace glowing patterns against the twilight sky.

When adventure calls again, Travelxploria guides you to the legendary Phi Phi archipelago. Slip into Maya Bay’s storied shallows, then ascend to the iconic viewpoint for a panoramic embrace of turquoise bays and jagged karsts. A private beachside lunch under swaying palms and a snorkeling session with our onboard marine biologist at Bamboo Island bring you face-to-face with playful parrotfish and vibrant anemones. As the sun dips low, drift back to Krabi for a laid-back seafood feast on Ao Nang’s waterfront, the night alive with lantern reflections on the lapping waves.

Seamless transfers carry you next to Phuket’s hillside sanctuary, where your private villa pool gazes across emerald jungle to the Andaman horizon. By dusk, you’re immersed in the spectacle of Phuket FantaSea: elephants in choreographed splendor, acrobats flying above the Grand Palace stage, and a lavish Thai banquet served beneath a starlit canopy. For deeper discovery, paddle through Phang Nga Bay’s limestone caves in a sea canoe or unwind on Kata’s crescent beach with a fresh coconut in hand. From Krabi’s hidden lagoons and Phi Phi’s cinematic beauty to Phuket’s cultural extravaganza, Travelxploria orchestrates every detail—so you can simply surrender to the rhythm of island life.

After checking out, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a smooth and comfortable drive to Krabi. Upon arrival, check in at your hotel and take a moment to unwind. Whether you choose to relax in your cozy room or soak in Krabi’s serene ambiance.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

packages.overview: Travelxploria welcomes you to Thailand’s kaleidoscope of color and calm, where every sunrise heralds a new adventure. Glide through the emerald channels of Krabi’s mangrove forests on a private longtail boat, pausing to swim in hidden lagoons framed by towering limestone cliffs. Swap sea breezes for city buzz in Phuket’s Old Town, where Sino-Portuguese façades glow in sunset light as you savor street-stall classics like spicy tom yum and mango sticky rice. Journey inland to the mist-shrouded hills of Chiang Mai, where you’ll learn ancient temple rituals from friendly monks before trekking alongside gentle giants in an ethical elephant sanctuary. As night falls, drift lanterns down the Mae Ping River during Loy Krathong, and feel your worries float away under a sky of firelit wishes. From boutique beachfront villas to mountain-top meditation sessions, every detail—transfers, guides, and local encounters—is handpicked by Travelxploria, crafting a Thailand experience that’s as vibrant and diverse as the land itself.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a Travelxploria representative—the best travel agency for Thailand—and whisked away on a scenic drive into Phuket’s lush jungle. With an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators, you’ll visit the ethical Elephant Jungle Sanctuary, where rescued elephants thrive in a natural setting.

Experience heartwarming moments as you interact with these majestic creatures and learn about their inspiring journeys. Enhance your visit with a delicious on-site meal featuring authentic Thai flavors and fresh local ingredients.

After a memorable half-day of jungle exploration and unforgettable encounters, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of your sanctuary visit.

After a leisurely breakfast and some sunbathing, our Travelxploria representative will ensure a seamless transfer as we set sail for the breathtaking Phi Phi Islands—your slice of paradise. Get ready to be mesmerized by stunning beaches, crystal-clear waters, and vibrant marine life. Savor delicious local dishes like khao yam, soak in breathtaking sunsets, and even spot playful monkeys along the shores. With endless beauty and unforgettable experiences, the next few days on Koh Phi Phi promise to be nothing short of magical.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Phi Phi Island Tour by Big Boat with Lunch","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Let the charm of Krabi create unforgettable moments of relaxation and adventure.

packages.package_name: Exotic Island Tour of Phuket and Krabi
packages.overview:
Phuket is a vibrant coastal hub, known for its lively markets, rich cultural heritage, and pristine beaches that offer both relaxation and adventure. It boasts a dynamic nightlife scene alongside world-class dining and shopping experiences. In contrast, Krabi offers a more tranquil escape, with dramatic limestone cliffs, hidden coves, and turquoise waters that invite exploration and outdoor adventures. The natural beauty of its islands creates a serene backdrop perfect for activities like snorkeling, kayaking, and rock climbing. Together, these destinations present a diverse and enriching travel experience that blends urban energy with natural splendor.

  • ​Phuket City Tour: Explore the vibrant streets and historic landmarks that capture the essence of local culture.
  • ​James Bond Island Tour: Experience cinematic splendor as you cruise through breathtaking seascapes to the iconic island.
  • ​Hong Island Tour: Discover hidden lagoons and emerald waters on an intimate tour of this tropical gem.​​

[{"city":"Phuket","country":"Thailand","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Phuket/1740928266278-1740501356883-1290.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Phuket/1740928263123-1740502358666-AdobeStock_99875240.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Phuket/1740928262988-1740501360674-phuket-1432891_1920.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Phuket/1740928262468-1740501359947-bence-biczo-odpWSKMwql4-unsplash.jpg"},{"path":"/Destination/Thailand/Phuket/1740928263713-1740502359145-AdobeStock_298248228.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival at Phuket - Half Day Phuket City Tour","day_summary":"

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse fgfg cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Embark on an enchanting evening as you're collected from your hotel by a gracious Travelxploria representative—the trusted name in Thai travel—and whisked away to the mesmerizing Siam Niramit Phuket Show. Begin your night by indulging in an exquisite Thai-Western fusion feast, presented in an elegant buffet that delights both the palate and the senses. As darkness falls, witness a breathtaking spectacle where state-of-the-art technology harmonizes with age-old traditions on one of the world’s most dazzling stages. Capture vibrant snapshots of performers clad in traditional Thai attire, each moment more vivid than the last, and immerse yourself in a cultural walkthrough that unveils the rich tapestry of Thailand's heritage. With seamless, hassle-free transfers ensuring your comfort, this unforgettable experience promises to leave you with cherished memories of a truly magical evening.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

Begin your day with a sumptuous buffet breakfast at your hotel, savoring local flavors before you’re whisked away by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s most trusted travel experts—for an unforgettable day trip from Krabi. Your journey begins at the breathtaking Hong Island, where rugged limestone cliffs rise majestically from crystalline turquoise waters, setting the stage for a day of tropical wonder. Delve into the serenity of Hong Lagoon, a hidden oasis where the gentle lapping of clear waters invites you to swim or simply bask in the natural splendor. The adventure continues as you explore Ko Pak Bia, a secluded paradise with sun-drenched shores and untouched beauty, and then move on to Ko Lao, where swaying palm trees and calm seascapes create a picture-perfect escape. Finally, the charming island of Lading offers pristine sandy stretches and vibrant marine life, making it an ideal spot for unforgettable photos. With each stop revealing a new facet of Krabi’s coastal magic, you’ll return to your hotel filled with vivid memories of nature’s splendor and a heart enriched by the enchanting beauty of these idyllic islands.

packages.overview:
Travelxploria presents: A 7-Day Escape through Phuket & Krabi

Your Thai adventure begins in the vibrant heart of Phuket, where golden beaches meet buzzing markets and tropical energy fills the air. Spend your days exploring iconic landmarks, savoring street food, and soaking in the island’s dynamic nightlife. As you journey along the scenic coastal route toward Krabi, enjoy relaxed car transfers with stops at breathtaking viewpoints and hidden local gems.

In Krabi, the pace slows and nature takes center stage. Towering limestone cliffs frame turquoise waters, while secret lagoons and white-sand beaches invite exploration. Set off on island-hopping tours, snorkel vibrant coral reefs, or paddle through quiet mangroves. Between moments of adventure, unwind with authentic Thai cuisine and immersive cultural encounters.

Whether it’s the buzz of Phuket or the serenity of Krabi, this 7-day escape blends excitement with relaxation—crafted by Travelxploria to create memories that last long after the sunsets fade.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Embark on an enchanting evening as you're collected from your hotel by a gracious Travelxploria representative—the trusted name in Thai travel—and whisked away to the mesmerizing Siam Niramit Phuket Show. Begin your night by indulging in an exquisite Thai-Western fusion feast, presented in an elegant buffet that delights both the palate and the senses. As darkness falls, witness a breathtaking spectacle where state-of-the-art technology harmonizes with age-old traditions on one of the world’s most dazzling stages. Capture vibrant snapshots of performers clad in traditional Thai attire, each moment more vivid than the last, and immerse yourself in a cultural walkthrough that unveils the rich tapestry of Thailand's heritage. With seamless, hassle-free transfers ensuring your comfort, this unforgettable experience promises to leave you with cherished memories of a truly magical evening.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.


Set sail on a captivating ocean escapade as you leave the urban buzz behind and head toward the shimmering blue expanse of Dolphins Bay in Phuket. Greeted by a warm and knowledgeable guide from Travelxploria, you'll quickly feel the tropical allure take over as you board a comfortable vessel for your adventure. As the boat glides over turquoise waters, prepare to be enchanted by playful dolphins performing their acrobatic routines, their graceful leaps painting the sky in a mesmerizing display of nature's artistry. You'll be picked up from your hotel by a Travelxploria representative—the best travel agency for Thailand—and whisked away on a scenic drive into Phuket’s lush jungle. With an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators, you’ll visit the ethical Elephant Jungle Sanctuary, where rescued elephants thrive in a natural setting.

Experience heartwarming moments as you interact with these majestic creatures and learn about their inspiring journeys. Enhance your visit with a delicious on-site meal featuring authentic Thai flavors and fresh local ingredients.

After a memorable half-day of jungle exploration and unforgettable encounters, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of your sanctuary visit.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

packages.overview:
• 2 nights in Phuket and 2 nights in Krabi for a perfect beach holiday.
  • Phi Phi Island tour with a visit to Maya Bay Beach, snorkeling, and crystal-clear waters.
  • 4 Islands Tour in Krabi covering Phra Nang Cave Beach, Chicken Island, Poda Island, and Tup Island.
  • Enjoy local markets, nightlife at Bangla Road, and serene beaches.
  • Scenic boat rides, water activities, and relaxing beach time throughout the trip.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

packages.overview:
• 2 nights in Phuket and 2 nights in Krabi for a perfect beach holiday.
  • Phi Phi Island tour with a visit to Maya Bay Beach, snorkeling, and crystal-clear waters.
  • 4 Islands Tour in Krabi covering Phra Nang Cave Beach, Chicken Island, Poda Island, and Tup Island.
  • Enjoy local markets, nightlife at Bangla Road, and serene beaches.
  • Scenic boat rides, water activities, and relaxing beach time throughout the trip.

packages.overview:
Thailand is a captivating tapestry of culture, nature, and heartfelt hospitality. In Phuket and Krabi, you’ll find the perfect harmony of adventure and tranquility—where turquoise waters meet golden sands, and lively markets buzz just steps away from quiet coves. Let the sea breeze guide you through moments of calm, while the pulse of Thai life invites you to explore deeper.

From time-honored traditions to modern comforts, every experience in Thailand feels thoughtfully woven and deeply personal. Whether you’re savoring spicy street food, wandering ancient temples, or simply watching the sun dip below the horizon, Thailand embraces you with warmth and wonder—leaving you with stories and memories that linger long after the journey ends.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

packages.overview:
• Arrival in Phuket – Warm welcome by our Travelxploria representative with a seamless transfer to Krabi.

  • Krabi Exploration – Discover the stunning Four Islands, relax on pristine beaches, and explore the Krabi Rainforest with a dip in the Emerald Pool and hot springs, followed by a delicious Thai lunch.

  • Transfer to Phuket – Enjoy a comfortable road journey with breathtaking coastal views.

  • Phuket Highlights – Visit Phi Phi Islands, explore the vibrant nightlife, and indulge in local cuisine.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

packages.overview: Discover the captivating allure of Thailand with Travelxploria as your guide, where the vibrant metropolis of Bangkok meets the sun-drenched charm of Pattaya. In Bangkok, ancient traditions blend seamlessly with modern innovation—majestic temples, bustling markets, and a thriving culinary scene create an urban tapestry that's as rich in culture as it is in energy. Just a short journey away, Pattaya offers a refreshing coastal escape with its beautiful beaches, dynamic nightlife, and an exciting array of water sports, perfect for those seeking both relaxation and adventure. With Travelxploria's expertly curated insights, experience the diverse spirit of Thailand and immerse yourself in a unique fusion of history, excitement, and natural beauty that will leave a lasting impression.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

Embark on an exhilarating journey in Phuket as you're promptly picked up from your hotel by a friendly Travelxploria representative and whisked away to the renowned Tiger Kingdom—a sanctuary where majestic tigers roam in lush, naturalistic settings. Here, you'll not only marvel at these powerful creatures but also enjoy a unique, interactive experience where you can touch and take photos with the tigers of your choice, creating unforgettable memories. Guided by knowledgeable staff dedicated to wildlife conservation, you'll gain fascinating insights into tiger behavior, their natural habitat, and the critical efforts underway to protect these magnificent animals. With seamless transfers ensuring your comfort, this tour offers an exceptional blend of adventure, hands-on interaction, and educational enrichment that deepens your appreciation for Thailand’s rich wildlife heritage.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

You'll be picked up from your hotel by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—and set off on an unforgettable journey from Phuket. Your adventure begins with a scenic drive along the stunning Andaman coastline, where your experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region shares fascinating insights about the local landscape and history.

As you cruise towards the iconic James Bond Island, prepare to discover cinematic landscapes where Hollywood glamour meets natural beauty. Marvel at the awe-inspiring limestone formations and sweeping views of the natural landscape, each scene more breathtaking than the last. Along the way, you'll have the opportunity to navigate your own canoe through serene caves that lead to quiet inner seas. For those seeking an extra thrill, an optional sea canoeing tour is available, allowing you to paddle deeper into hidden coves and explore tranquil, secluded spots off the beaten path.

Keep your camera ready as you spot the famous Tapu rock, immortalized in the film \"The Man with the Golden Gun,\" a must-see highlight for any film and nature enthusiast. And to top it all off, you'll take in the stunning sights from the water while enjoying an included buffet on board, where a variety of delicious Thai dishes are served against a backdrop of turquoise waters and dramatic cliffs.

After a day filled with exploration, adventure, and indulgence, you'll be transferred back to your hotel in Phuket, carrying with you unforgettable memories of this spectacular James Bond Island tour.

After breakfast, prepare for a scenic ferry transfer from Phuket to Krabi, a journey that combines comfort with spectacular views of the Andaman Sea. The ferry ride typically takes around 1.5 to 2.5 hours, depending on weather conditions and the ferry type, offering stunning sights of emerald waters, limestone islands, and coastal landscapes along the way. Departing from Rassada Pier in Phuket and arriving at Krabi’s Klong Jilad Pier, this route is both efficient and picturesque. Upon arrival, you'll be transferred to your hotel in Krabi, where the rest of the day is free for you to relax or explore at leisure.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

packages.overview: Discover the captivating allure of Thailand with Travelxploria as your guide, where the vibrant metropolis of Bangkok meets the sun-drenched charm of Pattaya. In Bangkok, ancient traditions blend seamlessly with modern innovation—majestic temples, bustling markets, and a thriving culinary scene create an urban tapestry that's as rich in culture as it is in energy. Just a short journey away, Pattaya offers a refreshing coastal escape with its beautiful beaches, dynamic nightlife, and an exciting array of water sports, perfect for those seeking both relaxation and adventure. With Travelxploria's expertly curated insights, experience the diverse spirit of Thailand and immerse yourself in a unique fusion of history, excitement, and natural beauty that will leave a lasting impression.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

You'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your immersive Phuket city tour. Whether you choose a morning or afternoon excursion, your journey through Phuket’s scenic routes is guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will share fascinating insights into the island’s rich cultural heritage and modern charm.

Your tour starts at Wat Chalong, Phuket’s most revered Buddhist temple, where you can admire the intricate architecture and learn about its historical significance. Next, you'll explore Phuket Old Town, renowned for its vibrant Sino-Portuguese architecture, bustling local markets, and charming cafes that capture the unique blend of tradition and modernity. The journey continues to the iconic Big Buddha, majestically perched atop Nakkerd Hill, offering panoramic views of Phuket and its sparkling coastline.

As your tour proceeds, you'll visit some of Phuket’s best viewpoints and hidden gems, perfect for memorable photographs and a deeper understanding of the island’s diverse cultural tapestry. Finally, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, enriched by the vibrant sights and sounds of Phuket and the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria.

Begin your day with a sumptuous buffet breakfast at your hotel, savoring local flavors before you’re whisked away by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s most trusted travel experts—for an unforgettable day trip from Krabi. Your journey begins at the breathtaking Hong Island, where rugged limestone cliffs rise majestically from crystalline turquoise waters, setting the stage for a day of tropical wonder. Delve into the serenity of Hong Lagoon, a hidden oasis where the gentle lapping of clear waters invites you to swim or simply bask in the natural splendor. The adventure continues as you explore Ko Pak Bia, a secluded paradise with sun-drenched shores and untouched beauty, and then move on to Ko Lao, where swaying palm trees and calm seascapes create a picture-perfect escape. Finally, the charming island of Lading offers pristine sandy stretches and vibrant marine life, making it an ideal spot for unforgettable photos. With each stop revealing a new facet of Krabi’s coastal magic, you’ll return to your hotel filled with vivid memories of nature’s splendor and a heart enriched by the enchanting beauty of these idyllic islands.

packages.overview:
1. 2 nights in Phuket and 2 nights in Krabi for a perfect beach holiday.

  2. Phi Phi Island tour with a visit to Maya Bay Beach, snorkeling, and crystal-clear waters.

  3. 4 Islands Tour in Krabi covering Phra Nang Cave Beach, Chicken Island, Poda Island, and Tup Island.

  4. Enjoy local markets, nightlife at Bangla Road, and serene beaches.

  5. Scenic boat rides, water activities, and relaxing beach time throughout the trip.

Resort & Villas Krabi.jpg\"}]"}]}}]},{"day_title":"Full Day 4 Islands tour by by Long tail boat with Lunch","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as one of the best travel agencies for Thailand—ensuring that your day-long adventure starts off smoothly. You'll then embark on a traditional long-tail boat / Speed Boat ride along Krabi’s stunning coastline, guided by an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will provide insightful commentary and ensure your comfort throughout the tour.

Your first destination is Phranang Cave Beach, where you can marvel at the dramatic limestone cliffs, explore hidden caves, and enjoy a refreshing dip in the crystal-clear waters. The journey continues to the Tup Islets, renowned for their striking rock formations and vibrant marine life, offering an ideal spot for snorkeling and capturing memorable photos—all under the watchful guidance of your experienced tour guide.

Next, you'll visit Chicken Island, aptly named for its unique shape resembling a chicken, where you can enjoy a leisurely swim and immerse yourself in the tropical ambiance. The adventure culminates at Koh Poda, a serene island boasting powdery white sands and turquoise waters, providing the perfect setting to relax and unwind. Along the way, a delicious Thai lunch is served, allowing you to savor local flavors while taking in the breathtaking views of the Andaman Sea.

After a day filled with exploration and relaxation, you'll be comfortably returned to your hotel, carrying with you unforgettable memories of Krabi’s natural beauty—all thanks to the impeccable service from Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand, and the dedicated team of the best tour operator.

Begin your day with a delightful journey that seamlessly blends spiritual discovery with natural rejuvenation in Krabi. After a satisfying breakfast, you'll be picked up by a friendly Travelxploria representative—one of Thailand’s trusted travel experts—and whisked away to the revered Tiger Cave Temple. Here, a climb through lush jungle pathways leads you to breathtaking panoramic views, setting the stage for an inspiring cultural encounter. Your adventure continues as you explore the enchanting Emerald Pool, a natural turquoise oasis nestled deep within the forest, inviting you for a refreshing dip in its crystal-clear waters. The tour culminates at the soothing Hot Springs, where steaming mineral-rich waters provide the perfect retreat for relaxation and rejuvenation. This immersive experience offers a perfect blend of cultural insight and natural wonder, leaving you with unforgettable memories of Krabi’s diverse and captivating landscapes.

Embark on an unforgettable journey with Travelxploria—one of Thailand’s premier travel agencies—as you set off on the Krabi 7 Islands Sunset Tour. Begin your adventure with a seamless pickup from your hotel and a short stop at Railay Beach before boarding a traditional longtail boat at Nopparat Thara Pier in Ao Nang. Under the guidance of an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, explore seven breathtaking islands that each offer their own unique allure. Discover Koh Yawasam with its expansive shallow coral gardens and pristine sandy stretches, then capture the vibrant beauty of the iconic chicken-shaped rock at Koh Kai—perfect for memorable photos. Enjoy a leisurely stop at Koh Tub, where you can relax on the beach or, at low tide, traverse the picturesque sandbank linking to nearby islets, and dip into the crystal-clear waters at Koh Tan Ming near Koh Poda.

As the day transforms into dusk, be captivated by the mesmerizing sunset on Koh Poda, where you’ll indulge in a delectable BBQ dinner served right on the beach. Savor a mouthwatering fusion of Thai flavors under a sky painted with hues of gold and crimson. To crown your magical evening, dive into an enchanting snorkeling experience amidst bio-luminescent plankton, as the ocean shimmers with an ethereal glow under the starlit sky. With hassle-free transfers back to your hotel and an itinerary designed to blend adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion, this tour promises to leave you with cherished memories of Krabi’s stunning seascapes and vibrant island life.

After a delightful breakfast, get ready to embark on a scenic journey to another breathtaking island destination in Phuket. As you travel by road, let the mesmerizing landscapes unfold before your eyes – lush green hills, sparkling coastlines, and charming local villages. Every twist and turn offers a new glimpse of the natural beauty that makes this region so enchanting, setting the perfect tone for the adventures that lie ahead.

After breakfast, you'll be picked up from your hotel lobby by a tour representative of Travelxploria—recognized as the best travel agency for Thailand—to begin your unforgettable Phi Phi Island adventure. Boarding a comfortable boat, you'll set sail with an experienced tour guide from one of the best tour operators in the region, who will enrich your journey with insights into the natural wonders and cultural history of the area.

Your tour begins with a scenic cruise toward Phi Phi Leh, the island famed for its breathtaking Maya Bay. Here, you'll be mesmerized by towering limestone cliffs, pristine white beaches, and crystal-clear waters—a perfect setting for a refreshing swim and stunning photographs. The captivating beauty of Phi Phi Leh sets the stage for the rest of your island-hopping experience.

Next, you'll venture to Phi Phi Don, the main island known for its vibrant local life and picturesque landscapes. Enjoy the dynamic energy of this island as you relax on its sandy shores and explore its natural charm. A special highlight of your journey is a stop at Monkey Beach on Phi Phi Don, where playful monkeys add a delightful touch to the tropical ambiance, making your experience even more memorable.

A delicious Thai lunch is served on board, allowing you to savor authentic local flavors while taking in the spectacular seascape. After a day filled with adventure, relaxation, and unforgettable moments, you'll be returned to your hotel, carrying cherished memories of the enchanting Phi Phi Islands—all thanks to the exceptional service provided by Travelxploria, the best travel agency for Thailand.

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.
