overview:
Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata


Step into a destination where tropical beaches, spiritual heritage, shopping streets, and buzzing nightlife come together effortlessly. If you are searching for the Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata, Travelxploria brings you carefully designed itineraries that balance comfort, value, and unforgettable experiences.

As a trusted international tour operator, Travelxploria offers Thailand tour packages from Kolkata that are ideal for honeymoon couples, families, groups, and first-time international travelers. From smooth visa assistance to well-planned sightseeing, everything is handled so you can simply enjoy the journey.


Why Choose a Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata

Easy Visa on Arrival and Affordable Flights

Thailand offers a visa on arrival for Indian passport holders, making travel simple and stress free. Direct and one stop flights from Kolkata keep travel time short and costs reasonable, which makes Thailand one of the most affordable international holidays from Eastern India.

Beaches, Culture, and Nightlife in One Trip

Thailand delivers variety in a compact itinerary. Relax on island beaches, explore historic temples, shop in floating and night markets, and experience nightlife that ranges from cultural shows to rooftop dining.

Perfect for Couples, Families, and Groups

Whether it is a honeymoon, a family holiday, or a friends trip, a Thailand tour package from Kolkata can be fully customized. Family travelers get safe hotels and kid friendly attractions, while couples enjoy romantic experiences and privacy.



Top Thailand Tour Packages From Kolkata

5 to 7 Days Thailand Tour Package

Covering Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket, this itinerary is perfect for first time visitors. It includes city tours, island excursions, shopping time, and beach relaxation.

Thailand Honeymoon Package From Kolkata

Designed for newlyweds, these packages include romantic beach dinners, private island tours, couple spa sessions, and sunset cruises. Phuket and Krabi are popular honeymoon inclusions.

Budget Friendly Thailand Tour Package

Ideal for travelers looking for value. These packages focus on comfortable hotels, shared sightseeing tours, and efficient planning without compromising on major attractions.

Customized Family and Group Packages

Enjoy private transfers, flexible sightseeing, and attractions such as water parks, cultural shows, and interactive experiences. These packages are popular among families traveling with children or elderly members.



Bangkok

Famous for the Grand Palace, Wat Arun, floating markets, and nightlife cruises. Bangkok blends tradition and modern lifestyle seamlessly.

Pattaya

Known for Coral Island tours, water sports, family attractions, and vibrant evening entertainment.

Phuket

Thailand’s most popular island destination with Patong Beach, island hopping tours, and adventure activities like snorkeling and speed boat rides.

Chiang Mai

A cultural hub with ancient temples, mountain views, ethical elephant sanctuaries, and Thai cooking classes.

Phi Phi Islands

Crystal clear waters, dramatic limestone cliffs, and some of the best snorkeling spots in Thailand.



What Is Included in the Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata

​

Airport transfers and local transportation

Comfortable hotel accommodation with breakfast

Guided sightseeing tours

Visa assistance and travel support

Optional travel insurance



Best Time to Visit Thailand From Kolkata

November to February

The most popular season with pleasant weather, ideal for sightseeing and beach activities.

March to May

Best for island lovers and water sports enthusiasts. Expect warmer temperatures and fewer crowds.

June to October

Monsoon season with attractive discounts on Thailand tour packages. Great for budget travelers who prefer quieter destinations.



Frequently Asked Questions

Do Indian travelers need a visa for Thailand
Yes. Indians are eligible for visa on arrival, and Travelxploria assists with the complete process.

How many days are ideal for a Thailand trip from Kolkata
A 5 to 7 day trip is ideal to cover Bangkok, Pattaya, and Phuket comfortably.

Is Thailand safe for families and solo travelers
Yes. Thailand is considered safe, and our itineraries focus on well rated hotels and reliable transport.

What is the best price for a Thailand tour package from Kolkata
Prices vary by season and hotel category. Booking early or during off season offers the best value.


How to Book the Best Thailand Tour Package From Kolkata

Travelxploria offers easy online booking, transparent pricing, and dedicated customer support. To get the best deals, book in advance, travel during shoulder seasons, and watch for festival offers.

Prepare your documents in advance, including passport, photographs, hotel confirmations, and some Thai Baht for local expenses.
